docs.title: Underwriting Documentation Portal
docs.text: Welcome to the underwriting documentation portal.

docs.title: Purpose
docs.text: This portal is the shared source of truth for underwriting initiatives, applications, UWWB platform documentation, shared capabilities, and audit/control evidence.

docs.title: How to use this portal
docs.text:
• Start with the portfolio overview
  • Use initiative overviews for program context
  • Use business views for process and user context
  • Use technical views for architecture, APIs, data, and support
  • Use audit pages for traceability and evidence alignment

docs.title: Purpose
docs.text: This page summarizes the underwriting documentation portfolio and how the initiatives fit together.

docs.title: Documentation layers
docs.text:
1. Initiative Overview
  2. Business View
  3. Technical View
  4. Operational Controls
  5. Audit and Evidence

docs.title: Portfolio model
docs.text:
• standalone initiatives for shared services and focused applications
  • UWWB platform structure for business-line and product-aligned documentation
  • shared standards and templates to keep documentation consistent

docs.title: Templates
docs.text: This section contains reusable markdown templates for documenting initiatives, applications, audit evidence, and business lines within the Underwriting Documentation Portal.

docs.title: Available Templates
docs.text: Template Description Initiative Overview High-level overview of an initiative: goals, scope, stakeholders Application Business View Business context, capabilities, and value delivered by an application Application Technical View Architecture, integrations, and technical design for an application Operational Controls Operational controls and monitoring for an application Control Mapping Mapping of controls to audit requirements Evidence Index Index of audit evidence artefacts Risk Register Risk identification, rating, and mitigation Decision Log Architecture and design decisions Policy Mapping Compliance and policy mapping Cutover Readiness Cutover readiness checklist and plan Benefits Realization Benefits tracking and realization plan Audit RACI RACI matrix for audit activities Legacy Retirement and SOR Mapping Legacy system retirement and system-of-record mapping Business Line Business View Business view template for a business line Business Line Technical View Technical view template for a business line Product Business View Business view template for a product Product Technical View Technical view template for a product

docs.title: How to Use
docs.text:
1. Copy the relevant template file into the appropriate location under docs/.
  2. Replace placeholder text (marked with <!-- ... --> or [PLACEHOLDER]) with your content.
  3. Add the new file to the nav: section of mkdocs.yml.
  4. Run mkdocs serve locally to preview before committing.

docs.title: Purpose
docs.text: Describe the business purpose of Account Hub and how it supports account and party data access.

docs.title: Business Problem Solved
docs.text: This application addresses gaps in workflow consistency, visibility, and operational traceability by providing a documented baseline for business and support stakeholders.

docs.title: Parent Initiative
docs.text: • Parent Initiative: Account Hub

docs.title: Targeted Users
docs.text: Underwriters, operations, systems

docs.title: Business Capabilities
docs.text:
• core workflow support
  • decision and data support
  • operational visibility
  • control traceability

docs.title: Process Flow
docs.text:
1. business event or request is initiated
  2. relevant data is validated or retrieved
  3. workflow or decision logic is applied
  4. outcome is recorded and communicated

docs.title: Inputs
docs.text:
• user or system request
  • reference or master data
  • workflow context

docs.title: Outputs
docs.text:
• updated status or decision
  • downstream notification or handoff
  • audit-relevant event or record

docs.title: Key Business Rules
docs.text:
• required inputs must be present before progression
  • exception conditions must be handled consistently
  • significant actions should be traceable

docs.title: Operational Value
docs.text: Creates a more consistent operating model and improves supportability and audit readiness.

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: master data source, UWWB

docs.text: Manual approvals, exception paths, and audit-relevant business events should be documented as the initiative matures.

docs.title: Control Overview
docs.text: Document the key preventive, detective, and support controls for Account Hub.

docs.title: Preventive Controls
docs.text: Control ID Control Name Description Owner Frequency Evidence PC-01 Access Control Only approved users and systems can access the application Continuous Access records PC-02 Release Control Changes follow controlled release process Per release Change record

docs.title: Detective Controls
docs.text: Control ID Control Name Description Owner Frequency Evidence DC-01 Failure Monitoring Failed processing or integration issues generate alerts Continuous Monitoring dashboard

docs.title: Access Controls
docs.text:
• user access follows approved provisioning process
  • elevated access is restricted and reviewable

docs.title: Change Controls
docs.text:
• production changes require review and approval
  • emergency changes should be documented and reviewed afterward

docs.title: Interface / Batch Controls
docs.text:
• interface failures are detected through monitoring
  • recovery actions are documented through support process

docs.title: Reconciliation Controls
docs.text: • key status or processing counts should be reviewed where applicable

docs.title: Logging and Audit Trail Controls
docs.text: Significant processing events, failures, and exception handling should be logged.

docs.title: Incident and Escalation Controls
docs.text: Incidents are triaged by L1 and escalated to higher support tiers as needed.

docs.title: Control Exceptions
docs.text: Exceptions should be approved, logged, and reviewed.

docs.title: Related Risks
docs.text:
• dependency outages
  • incomplete evidence linkage
  • support coverage gaps

docs.text:
• monitoring dashboard
  • change records
  • access reviews
  • incident tickets
